subject: Hercule / Mr. Satan (Dragon Ball Super) — anime IP character, bravado pose in martial arts tournament context
description: A large, broad-shouldered male figure with voluminous curly dark hair and a thick mustache poses with one arm raised, wearing a red martial arts jacket. His expression is broad and confident — a signature showboating pose. His build is stocky and powerful without being lean. The card art uses a close-up framing that emphasizes the character's theatrically bold personality. The background is light and relatively neutral.
foreground: Large stocky male with curly dark hair, thick mustache, red jacket, one arm raised in a bravado gesture
background: Light neutral background with minimal detail
